title: Stakeholder Task, Workflow Fit, Authority, Risk, and Evidence
description: A sponsor asks for an autonomous assistant but has not defined the user decision, accepted failure, permitted actions, affected people, oversight, or why a deterministic workflow is insufficient. Learners cumulatively produce bounded agent product and risk charter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define stakeholder, user population, decision, task distribution, observable value, failure, review cadence, and non-goals before choosing a model.
Compare deterministic code, workflow, model-assisted step, and agent loop and choose the least variable architecture that satisfies the task.
Classify impact, reversibility, affected groups, uncertainty, data sensitivity, action authority, and required human oversight.
